subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God! Shouldst thou inquire about My dwelling-place, it is imprisonment; and if thou asketh about My sustenance, it is trials and tribulations; and as for My body [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله اگر از منزل پرسی سجن و اگر از غذا پرسی بلایا و محن و اگر از جسد
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @love of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @justice and wrath of God
